jobs.title: Senior iOS Engineer

company.name: Stripe
company.about: Stripe is a technology company that builds economic infrastructure for the internet. Businesses of every size use our software to accept payments and manage their businesses online.

jobs.description: We are looking for a Senior iOS Engineer to join our mobile infrastructure team. You will build and scale the Stripe iOS SDK used by millions of merchants worldwide. You will work closely with product, design, and backend engineers to deliver high-quality, reliable payment experiences.
requirements: Deep knowledge of Swift and UIKit/SwiftUI
Experience with payment SDKs or financial apps
Strong understanding of threading, memory management, and performance
Experience with unit and UI testing

jobs.title: iOS Developer

company.name: Airbnb
company.about: Airbnb is an online marketplace that connects people who want to rent out their homes with people looking for accommodations. We're on a mission to create a world where anyone can belong anywhere.

jobs.description: Join Airbnb's Guest & Host Experience team to build the features that connect millions of travelers with unique homes around the world. You'll own end-to-end development of iOS features including search, booking flows, and messaging.
requirements: Experience with REST APIs and JSON parsing

jobs.title: Mobile Engineer – iOS

company.name: Spotify
company.about: Spotify is a digital music service that gives you access to millions of songs. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art.

jobs.description: As a Mobile Engineer at Spotify, you will work within one of our cross-functional squads to design, build, and ship features used by over 600 million users. You'll be deeply involved in technical decisions, from architecture to release strategy.
requirements: Experience with audio/media frameworks is a plus
Passion for music and user experience
Ability to work in a fast-paced agile environment

jobs.title: Junior iOS Developer

company.name: Nubank
company.about: Nubank is one of the world's largest digital financial services platforms, empowering people in Latin America to take control of their financial lives.

jobs.description: We're looking for a Junior iOS Developer to join our growing mobile team. You'll work alongside senior engineers to build new features for our banking app used by 90+ million customers across Latin America.
requirements: 1+ year iOS development or strong portfolio

jobs.title: iOS Engineer – SwiftUI

company.name: Linear
company.about: Linear is a project management tool built for high-performance teams. We obsess over craft and design to build products that teams love.

jobs.description: Linear is looking for an iOS engineer who is passionate about crafting delightful, high-performance native apps. You'll own the iOS client, working closely with our small, focused team to ship features that make developers more productive every day.
requirements: Attention to detail in UI and performance
Experience building Mac Catalyst or macOS apps is a bonus

jobs.title: iOS Contract Developer

company.name: Thoughtworks
company.about: Thoughtworks is a global technology consultancy that integrates strategy, design and engineering to drive digital innovation.

jobs.description: Thoughtworks is seeking an experienced iOS contractor for a 6-month engagement with a Fortune 500 retail client. You'll be embedded in a cross-functional delivery team building a consumer-facing shopping app.
requirements: Experience delivering apps in a consulting context

jobs.title: Staff iOS Engineer

company.name: Robinhood
company.about: Robinhood Markets is an American financial services company offering commission-free trades of stocks and exchange-traded funds via a mobile app.

jobs.description: As a Staff iOS Engineer at Robinhood, you will define technical strategy for our mobile platform and mentor a team of engineers. You'll tackle large-scale architectural challenges, drive cross-team initiatives, and ensure the stability and performance of an app used by millions of investors.
requirements: Track record of leading large technical projects
Deep expertise in Swift, Objective-C interop, and performance profiling

jobs.title: iOS Developer – Health Tech

company.name: Oura
company.about: Oura is a Finnish health technology company known for the Oura Ring, a smart ring that provides detailed health tracking metrics including sleep, activity, and readiness.

jobs.description: Join Oura's iOS team to build the companion app for the world's most advanced health ring. You'll work on Bluetooth LE communication, HealthKit integration, and beautiful data visualization features that help users understand their health.
requirements: HealthKit knowledge is a strong plus
Interest in health and wellness technology

jobs.title: iOS Engineering Intern

company.name: Duolingo
company.about: Duolingo is a language-learning platform with a mission to develop the best education in the world and make it universally available.

jobs.description: Duolingo is offering iOS engineering internships for students passionate about mobile development and education. Interns work on real features shipped to Duolingo's 500M+ users and are mentored by senior engineers throughout the program.
requirements: Currently enrolled in a CS or related degree program
Personal or academic iOS project experience

jobs.title: Senior Mobile Engineer (iOS)

company.name: Figma
company.about: Figma is a web-first collaborative interface design tool. Our mission is to make design accessible to all.

jobs.description: Figma is hiring a Senior Mobile Engineer to build the iOS app that lets designers and developers collaborate on the go. This role requires deep native expertise and a strong eye for design quality. You'll work closely with design and backend teams to deliver a world-class mobile experience.
requirements: Experience with complex rendering or canvas-based apps is a strong plus
Strong product sense and design sensibility
Experience with WebGL or Metal is a bonus

jobs.title: Freelance iOS Developer

company.name: Toptal
company.about: Toptal is an exclusive network of the top freelance software developers, designers, finance experts, product managers, and project managers in the world.

jobs.description: Toptal is seeking elite iOS developers to join its network of top 3% tech talent. Successful applicants gain access to premium freelance projects with top-tier clients worldwide, with flexibility to choose engagement types and hours.
requirements: Ability to work independently with minimal oversight

jobs.title: iOS Engineer – Maps & Navigation

company.name: Lyft
company.about: Lyft is a transportation network company offering a ridesharing service, motorized scooters, bicycle-sharing system, and rental cars in the United States and Canada.

jobs.description: Lyft's Maps & Navigation team is looking for an iOS engineer to work on the real-time mapping, routing, and ETA features central to the Lyft rider and driver experience. You will work with MapKit, CoreLocation, and custom rendering pipelines at scale.
requirements: Experience with MapKit, CoreLocation, or similar mapping frameworks
Strong algorithm skills (graph traversal, geospatial queries a plus)
Interest in transportation and real-time systems
